{"key_event":"Mass politics and legalized labour amid administrative expansion","reasoning":"Civil society strengthened further as secret ballot, union legalization, education boards, Irish tenant/Home Rule mobilization, and party caucuses broadened organized popular leverage, though economic strain and remaining exclusions kept it below dominant. State power also rose through professional civil service, education, courts, public health, factory regulation, and Irish land intervention, despite more contested authority in Ireland.","society_change":0.4,"society_power":8.8,"state_change":0.2,"state_power":8.9}
